title: Vanish Oxi Action Carpet Stain Remover Carpet Serum & Scrubbing Head 195ml
features: Vanish new best carpet stain remover with a convenient scrubbing head
Effective and powerful formula with Vanish Oxi Action for great results
Targets and removes carpet and upholstery stains, such as mud, red wine, tea, grass, ink, sauce and others
Safe for use on different carpet colours & fabrics
Easy application! Just squeeze on stain and rub in circles
description: Product Description Vanish Oxi Action Carpet Stain Remover helps target and remove stains from carpets and upholstery. The scrubbing head is specially designed for targeting and removing stains such as mud, red wine, tea, grass, ink, sauce, and others. The easy application results in swift removal of stains and is safe for use on different carpet colours and fabrics. Not suitable for silk and oriental rugs. Before use, remove loose dirt and blot the wet stains with a clean absorbent cloth and watch our carpet stain remover deliver amazing results! For best results: - Treat stain immediately - Use the bottle slightly tilted and rub gently - Allow to dry and vacuum away Tough stains may require a second application. Ingredients Sulfuric acid, monoC12-14-alkyl esters, sodium salts, HYDROGEN PEROXIDE (<3%)
